sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104866" key="triglobo/los" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τριγλοβόλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n104866.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">casting</tr_> (the net) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">at mullets,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.966a</biblScope></bibl>, prob. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">983e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
